About

Hey! My name is Josh. I mostly do programming things these days, but I've dabbled a bit in music, math, and poetry as well. I've written a book of poems called All the World to Me, and I worked for a while on the Public Domain Tapes podcast (though it has lately fallen by the wayside). I also have lots of little side projects, most of which rarely see the light of day. I hope you find something useful here.

I can be reached via email at jrc03c@pm.me.
